rationale: Educ. Code §12.051 defines 'parent' and 'board' for a school district subchapter. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote:
Sec. 12.051. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Parent" means the parent who is indicated on the student registration form at that school campus.
(2) "Board" and "board of trustees" mean the board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of a home-rule school district.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
